results.question: How many properties did I view before making an offer on the townhouse in the Brookside neighborhood?
results.gold: I viewed four properties before making an offer on the townhouse in the Brookside neighborhood. The reasons I didn't make an offer on them were: the kitchen of the bungalow needed serious renovation, the property in Cedar Creek was out of my budget, the noise from the highway was a deal-breaker for the 1-bedroom condo, and my offer on the 2-bedroom condo was rejected due to a higher bid.
